creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On 06/23/12 15:41, Stephen Montgomery-Smith wrote:
> On 06/23/2012 06:21 AM, O. Hartmann wrote:
>> On 06/23/12 01:14, Stephen Montgomery-Smith wrote:
>>> Also, can you tell me if you are able to build math/open-axiom?  I am
>>> also maintainer of that port.
>>
>>
>> I can. On FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT #1 r237462: Sat Jun 23 01:00:35 CEST 2012.
>>
> 
> 
> So just to confirm, both fricas and open-axiom build properly for you?

Yes, they do. FRICAS, still installed, build for me on FreeBSD
10-CURRENT - I think it is a prerequisite of opem-axiom, isn't it?
